rulings.Case Title: ZHOU HUA RONG et al VS. LARRY WEI et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Larry Wei And Fong Chieng For Leave To File Third Amended Cross Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday September 27, 2016, line 1 CROSS COMPLAINANT LARRY WEI, FONG CHIENG Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Larry Wei And Fong Chieng For Leave To File Third Amended Cross Complaint is GRANTED, as modified in reply. Seller's agents failed to show prejudice in light of the changed circumstances (consolidation of actions) and the ruling on their Motion for Summary Judgment. Also, cases cited by the sellers' agents are factually and procedurally distinguishable. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ZHOU HUA RONG et al VS. LARRY WEI et al
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday September 27, 2016, line 1 DEFENDANT NRT LLC, NRT WEST, INC., VALLEY OF CALIFORNIA, INC. DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is sustained in part and overruled in part. Plaintiffs shall file their amended complaint within 10 days of notice of entry of order. Plaintiffs' amended complaint shall be the sole operative complaint for the consolidated action. Plaintiffs, if necessary and proper, may file a motion for DOE Designation based on the operative complaint concurrently with the filing of the amended complaint. If such motion is filed, Defendants' time to respond will run from the date of notice of entry of order on the Doe Designation motion. If such motion is not filed, Defendants shall file their response in accordance with the law. (a) Demurrer is sustained without leave to amend as to causes of action for breach of warranty of habitability and quiet enjoyment - non-opposition filed. (b) Demurrer is sustained without leave to amend as to causes of action for UCL violation - improper remedy sought and no amendment suggested; (c) Demurrer to the 6th, 9th, 16th, 17th, and 24th causes of action is sustained without leave to amend as they are barred by the applicable statute of limitations. (d) Demurrer to the 11th to 15th; and 19th, 20th, causes of action is sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege in good faith each element of each cause of action as to the moving defendants including any events giving rise to the accrual of the cause of action and any facts giving rise to delayed discovery. (e) Demurrer to the 22nd cause of action is sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiffs to allege in good faith each element of this cause of action based on events occurring on October 15, 2013. The Court does not rule on the demurrer based on Statute of Limitations (possible DOE Amendment) as to causes of action 1, 2, 5, 9, 18 and 21 at this time. See Ruling RE: Plaintiff's Motion for Leave to Designate Does. Defendant may raise the same arguments is necessary and proper in their response to the amended complaint. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ZHOU HUA RONG et al VS. LARRY WEI et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday September 27, 2016, line 1 CROSS DEFENDANT CHRISTINA CHUNG, NRT WEST INC. DBA COLDWELL BANKER RESIDENTIAL MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication is a. Motion for Summary Adjudication as the Cross-Complaints filed by buyers and by byers' agents is denied. Moving party failed to comply with CRC 3.1350(b) b. Motion for Summary Judgment as to buyers' claims in this action is DENIED. As of January 28, 2016 when actions 538601 and 549025 were consolidated/merged the following causes of action are alleged against the moving defendants by the buyers: indemnification; apportionment of fault; breach of contract; interference with contract; interference with prospective advantage; intentional misrepresentation; material omissions; negligent misrepresentation; negligence; NIED; UCL; deception; declaratory relief. Motion for Summary Judgment does not dispose of all claims asserted against the moving parties in this consolidated action. c. Motion for Summary Judgment as to the buyers' agents' claims is denied. Triable issues of fact as to the understanding of and reasonableness of reliance on the representations made in the flyer and MLS listing coupled with representations made by Chung to Lam. The Court also notes that there are a number of purportedly undisputed facts which, as drafted, are not supported by the evidence cited, e.g. seperate statment 7, 22, 23, 29. = (501/REQ) = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ZHOU HUA RONG et al VS. LARRY WEI et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Plaintiffs Motion For Leave To File Designation Of Does 1 11 To First Amended Complaint In Case Cgc-14-538601
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday September 27, 2016, line 1 PLAINTIFF ZHOU RONG, JUN-YI ZHAO, MING ZHAO Notice Of Plaintiffs Motion For Leave To File Designation Of Does 1 11 To First Amended Complaint In Case Cgc-14-538601 is OFF CALENDAR, First Amended Complaint filed on November 4, 2014 is no longer the operative complaint in this action. Plaintiff may file its Motion for Leave to File Designation of Does on current operative complaint concurrently with an amended complaint per ruling on Demurrer. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SUNDIATA KNIGHT VS. ADOLPHUS NWIHIIM ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Default And Vacating Default Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday September 27, 2016, line 2. DEFENDANT ADOLPHUS NWIHIIM, ROSEMARY NWIHIIM Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Default And Vacating Default Judgment is GRANTED, per Defendant's declaration and in absence of evidence to the contrary, Proof of Service indicates that the purported service (Summons and Complaint and Statement of Damages) was not accomplished at defendants' residence on a member of their household. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: HARRIET SCHATZ ET AL VS. 2415 BUCHANAN, LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Plaintiffs Fourth Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday September 27, 2016, line 7. DEFENDANT 2415 BUCHANAN, LLC, CHARLES MOORE, CHARLES MOORE AS TRUSTEE OF THE TRUST AGREEMENT Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Plaintiffs Fourth Amended Complaint is GRANTED, Plaintiff was provided a final leave to amend to allege facts (not conclusions) malice, oppression or fraud. Plaintiff failed to do so. The Court notes that Plaintiff also failed to comply with SFLR 2.7B. Plaintiff's opposition was considered notwithstanding failure to comply with SFLR 2.7B. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: FREEDOM WEST HOMES VS. GEORGIA PEMBERTON ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enforce Stipulation
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday September 27, 2016, line 10. PLAINTIFF FREEDOM WEST HOMES Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enforce Stipulation is GRANTED in part and DENIED in part (without prejudice). The motion is granted to the extent Plaintiff is seeking to extend the terms of the stipulation until October 1, 2017 in light of Defendant's belated effort to seek a restraining order against Cavin Pemberton. Plaintiff's motion for entry of judgment is denied without prejudice. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Compel Discovery To Establish Admission From Pltf And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Pltf; Mpa
